zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Joan de Lowdham於1409年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾洛達哈姆時，她的父親John De Lowdham31歲，母親Jane Kelvedon19歲。她於大約1423年與Sir Ralph Blennerhasset在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1501年6月20日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可福倫享年92歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可福倫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Joan de Lowdham于1409年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾洛達哈姆时，她的父亲John De Lowdham31岁，母亲Jane Kelvedon19岁。她于大约1423年与Sir Ralph Blennerhasset在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1501年6月20日在英国英格兰諾福爾可福倫享年92岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可福倫。

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Joan de Lowdham was born in 1409, in Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John De Lowdham, was 31 and her mother, Jane Kelvedon, was 19. She married Sir Ralph Blennerhasset about 1423, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 20 June 1501, in Frenze, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 92, and was buried in Frenze, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Joan de Lowdham est née en 1409, à Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John De Lowdham, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Jane Kelvedon, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Blennerhasset environ 1423, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 juin 1501, à Frenze, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 92 ans, et a été enterrée à Frenze, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Joan de Lowdham 1409 in Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John De Lowdham 31 und ihre Mutter Jane Kelvedon 19. Sie hat um 1423 in England Sir Ralph Blennerhasset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Juni 1501 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Frenze, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Frenze, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Joan de Lowdham è nata il nel 1409 nel Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John De Lowdham, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Jane Kelvedon, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir Ralph Blennerhasset circa 1423, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 giugno 1501, nel Frenze, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 92 anni, e fu sepolta a Frenze, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Joan de Lowdhamが1409年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアロウドハムで生まれた時，父John De Lowdhamは31歳，母Jane Kelvedonは19歳であった。約1423年にイギリスでSir Ralph Blennerhassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1501年6月20日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクフレンズで92歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクフレンズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Joan de Lowdham(이)가 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 로드함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John De Lowdham(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Kelvedon(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1423년 영국에서 Sir Ralph Blennerhasset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1501년 6월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 프렌즈에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 프렌즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Joan de Lowdham nasceu em 1409, em Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John De Lowdham, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Jane Kelvedon, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Ralph Blennerhasset aproximadamente 1423, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de junho de 1501, em Frenze, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 92 anos, e foi sepultada em Frenze, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Joan de Lowdham родилась в 1409 г. в местности лоудхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John De Lowdham было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Jane Kelvedon, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Blennerhasset около 1423 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 июня 1501 г. в местности френз, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 92 лет и была похоронена в местности френз, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió el 20 de junio de 1501, en Frenze, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 92 años, y fue sepultada en Frenze, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
